scripts.build: which cargo > /dev/null 2>&1 && cargo build --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml && cp ../target/release/libvertz_compiler.dylib ./vertz-compiler.darwin-arm64.node || echo 'Skipping native build (cargo not found)'
scripts.test: test -f vertz-compiler.darwin-arm64.node && bun test __tests__/ || echo 'Skipping native tests (binary not found)'
